prompt: A photorealistic, highly detailed portrait of a muscular Mesoamerican warrior standing proudly. He wears an elaborate headdress adorned with red, green, and black feathers and a carved stone mask. His face features dark painted lines across his cheeks and nose. He is outfitted in heavy, intricate ceremonial armor, including a large stone necklace with a face pendant, armbands, and a detailed belt with a loincloth featuring carved glyphs and faces. In his right hand, he grips a tall wooden spear with a stone tip and red tassels, and in his left hand, he holds a round shield displaying a large carved face with red fringed edges. The background features a towering ancient stepped stone pyramid with steep stairs, banners hanging near the top entrance, and small figures standing on the steps. Lush green jungle foliage surrounds the temple under a partly cloudy sky, with a tall carved stone stela standing in the right foreground, all captured with epic cinematic lighting.
